title: Docker Troubleshooting Lab
description: Capstone lab for diagnosing container crashes, port conflicts, volume issues, network failures, and resource cleanup.

tasks.prompt: List all containers including exited ones to find crash loops.
tasks.explanation: Exited containers often reveal restart loops and error exit codes.

tasks.prompt: Show the last 100 log lines from container 'api'.
tasks.explanation: Recent logs usually contain the stack trace or error message.

tasks.prompt: Inspect container 'api' to check its State and ExitCode.
tasks.explanation: Inspect JSON includes ExitCode, OOMKilled, and restart counters.

tasks.prompt: Stream live CPU and memory usage for all running containers.
tasks.explanation: docker stats helps identify memory leaks and CPU saturation.

tasks.prompt: Run 'nginx' on host port 8080 mapping to container port 80 (detached).
tasks.hint: Use -p 8080:80 to avoid conflicting with host port 80.
tasks.explanation: Port remapping resolves conflicts when host ports are already bound.

tasks.prompt: Open an interactive shell inside running container 'api' for live debugging.
tasks.explanation: exec lets you inspect filesystem and processes inside a live container.

tasks.prompt: Inspect network 'app-net' to verify container endpoints are attached.
tasks.explanation: Missing endpoints explain service-to-service connectivity failures.

tasks.prompt: Inspect volume 'db-data' to confirm mountpoint and driver.
tasks.explanation: Volume inspection validates persistent data paths.

tasks.prompt: View compose logs for only the 'api' service.
tasks.explanation: Service-scoped logs isolate failures in multi-container stacks.

tasks.prompt: Restart the failing 'api' service in the compose stack.
tasks.explanation: Restarting a single service avoids disrupting healthy components.

tasks.prompt: Stream real-time Docker daemon events for troubleshooting.
tasks.explanation: docker events shows create, die, oom, and network attach activity.

tasks.prompt: Show Docker disk usage summary for images, containers, and volumes.
tasks.explanation: Disk pressure can cause pull and start failures on full hosts.
